question_tagalog: Anong pinakamalaking pangarap mo para sa ating dalawa?
question_english: What is your biggest dream for the two of us?
quote_tagalog: Tutuparin natin lahat ng pangarap nang magkasama.
quote_english: We will fulfill all our dreams together.

question_tagalog: Pano mo nakikita ang buhay natin 10 years from now?
question_english: How do you see our life 10 years from now?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong mangyari, ikaw pa rin kasama ko.
quote_english: No matter what happens, you're still with me.

question_tagalog: Saan mo gustong mag-retire kasama ako?
question_english: Where do you want to retire with me?
quote_tagalog: Basta tahimik na buhay kasama ka.
quote_english: As long as it's a quiet life with you.

question_tagalog: Anong klaseng bahay ang gusto nating ipundar?
question_english: What kind of house do we want to invest in?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang tahanan ko.
quote_english: You are my home.

question_tagalog: Pano tayo mag-iipon para sa future ni baby natin?
question_english: How will we save for our future baby?
quote_tagalog: Pagpaplanuhan natin ang magandang bukas.
quote_english: We will plan for a beautiful tomorrow.

question_tagalog: Sinong magiging mas strict satin pagdating sa pera?
question_english: Who will be stricter between us when it comes to money?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng ito para rin sa atin.
quote_english: All of this is for us too.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba ng maraming anak o unti lang?
question_english: Do you want many kids or just a few?
quote_tagalog: Gagawa tayo ng sariling malaking pamilya.
quote_english: We will build our own big family.

question_tagalog: Anong tradition ang gusto mong i-start natin as a family?
question_english: What tradition do you want us to start as a family?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang gagawa ng sarili nating kwento.
quote_english: We will write our own story.

question_tagalog: Saan mo gustong mag-travel tayong dalawa soon?
question_english: Where do you want us to travel soon?
quote_tagalog: Iikutin natin buong mundo.
quote_english: We will travel the whole world.

question_tagalog: Ano ang naiisip mong business natin together?
question_english: What business do you think we can have together?
quote_tagalog: Partner kita sa lahat ng bagay in life.
quote_english: You are my partner in everything in life.

question_tagalog: Pano mo inaalagaan ang health mo for our future?
question_english: How do you take care of your health for our future?
quote_tagalog: Kailangan nating humaba pa ang buhay natin.
quote_english: We need to prolong our lives.

question_tagalog: Pwede bang wag tayong magbago pag nakaluwag-luwag na tayo?
question_english: Can we just not change when we become financially comfortable?
quote_tagalog: Yung buhay magbabago pero tayo hindi.
quote_english: Life will change but we won't.

question_tagalog: Anong skills gusto mong matutunan natin both?
question_english: What skills do you want us both to learn?
quote_tagalog: Sabay tayong matuto at mag-grow.
quote_english: Let's learn and grow together.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ihahandle if isa satin mawalan ng trabaho?
question_english: How will you handle it if one of us loses a job?
quote_tagalog: Sasaluhin kita pag di mo na kaya.
quote_english: I will catch you when you can't handle it.

question_tagalog: Saan mo gustong i-celebrate natin 50th anniversary natin?
question_english: Where do you want us to celebrate our 50th anniversary?
quote_tagalog: Kahit puti na buhok natin, mahal parin kita.
quote_english: Even when our hair is gray, I'll still love you.

question_tagalog: Ano ang definition mo ng financial freedom?
question_english: What is your definition of financial freedom?
quote_tagalog: Wala na tayong iisiping utang balang araw.
quote_english: We won't think about debts someday.

question_tagalog: Pano natin tutulungan ang parents natin sa future?
question_english: How will we help our parents in the future?
quote_tagalog: Magiging pamilya rin natin sila.
quote_english: They will become our family too.

question_tagalog: Ano yung hobby na gusto mong i-pursue pag mayaman na tayo?
question_english: What hobby do you want to pursue when we're rich?
quote_tagalog: Suportado ko lahat ng hilig mo.
quote_english: I support all your interests.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka bang ma-aachieve natin dream life natin?
question_english: Do you believe we'll achieve our dream life?
quote_tagalog: Kaya natin to basta tulong tayo.
quote_english: We can do this as long as we help each other.

question_tagalog: Pwede mo bang i-promise na sabay tayo lagi mag-dedecide sa malalaking bagay?
question_english: Can you promise we'll always decide together on big things?
quote_tagalog: Boses mo palagi mahalaga sakin.
quote_english: Your voice is always important to me.

question_tagalog: Anong una nating bibilhin pag naging milyonaryo tayo?
question_english: What's the first thing we'll buy when we become millionaires?
quote_tagalog: Bibilhin natin ang comfort natin.
quote_english: We will buy our comfort.

question_tagalog: Sino sa atin mas magaling mag-manage ng savings?
question_english: Who between us is better at managing savings?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw maghawak ng pera para ligtas.
quote_english: You hold the money to keep it safe.

question_tagalog: Pano ka nag-aadjust sa goals mo para isama ako?
question_english: How do you adjust your goals to include me?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng plano ko may pangalan mo.
quote_english: All my plans have your name on them.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba sa city or sa province tayo tumira?
question_english: Do you want us to live in the city or the province?
quote_tagalog: Basta tahimik na buhay kasama ka nakaka-relax.
quote_english: As long as it's a calm life with you, it's relaxing.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo gustong magkabahay na tayo na sarili natin?
question_english: When do you want us to have our own house?
quote_tagalog: Pakonti-konti mabubuo rin natin.
quote_english: Little by little, we'll get there.

question_tagalog: Ano yung biggest fear mo regarding sa future natin together?
question_english: What is your biggest fear regarding our future together?
quote_tagalog: Wag kang matakot, sasamahan kita.
quote_english: Don't be afraid, I'll accompany you.

question_tagalog: Pano natin i-mementain yung spark kahit busy tayo sa goals?
question_english: How do we maintain the spark even when busy with goals?
quote_tagalog: May time lagi para maglambingan.
quote_english: There's always time for affection.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang pet na gusto mong alagaan natin sa bahay natin?
question_english: What's the first pet you want us to take care of in our house?
quote_tagalog: Dadami ang members ng family natin.
quote_english: Our family members will multiply.

question_tagalog: Pano natin idi-divide ang gawaing bahay sa future?
question_english: How will we divide household chores in the future?
quote_tagalog: Hati tayo sa lahat ng bagay.
quote_english: We share everything.

question_tagalog: Ano yung isang childhood dream mo na gusto mong mangyari kasama ko?
question_english: What's one childhood dream you want to happen with me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang pangarap ko na natupad na.
quote_english: You're my only dream that came true.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang magkaroon tayo ng joint bank account soon?
question_english: Do you want us to have a joint bank account soon?
quote_tagalog: Pagtitiwala ang foundation ng inipon natin.
quote_english: Trust is the foundation of our savings.

question_tagalog: Ano tingin mong pinakamahirap na struggle natin as a married couple?
question_english: What do you think is our hardest struggle as a married couple?
quote_tagalog: Lalampasan natin lahat ng pagsubok.
quote_english: We will overcome all trials.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging sikat tayo sa isang bagay, sa anong larangan?
question_english: If we become famous for something, in what field?
quote_tagalog: Power couple tayo sa mata nila.
quote_english: We are a power couple in their eyes.

question_tagalog: Pano natin mai-inspire ang future kids natin?
question_english: How will we inspire our future kids?
quote_tagalog: Sana lumaki silang puno ng pagmamahal natin.
quote_english: I hope they grow up full of our love.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang mag-aral uli o kumuha ng master's degree together?
question_english: Do you want to study again or take a master's degree together?
quote_tagalog: Sabay tayong aakyat paitaas.
quote_english: We will climb to the top together.

question_tagalog: Anong rule ang gusto mong i-set natin sa sarili nating bahay?
question_english: What rule do you want us to set in our own house?
quote_tagalog: Bawal matulog nang magkagalit.
quote_english: We shouldn't sleep angry at each other.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ako gustong suportahan sa career ko pagnaging asawa mo nako?
question_english: How do you want to support me in my career when you become my spouse?
quote_tagalog: Number one fan mo ko forever.
quote_english: I am your number one fan forever.

question_tagalog: Pano tayo magse-celebrate pag naabot natin first million natin?
question_english: How will we celebrate when we reach our first million?
quote_tagalog: Kasiyahan natin na makitang umaasenso tayo.
quote_english: It's our joy to see ourselves succeeding.

question_tagalog: Kung pwede tayong lumipat ng bansa, saan mo gusto?
question_english: If we could move to another country, where do you want?
quote_tagalog: Kung nasaan ka, dun din ako.
quote_english: Wherever you are, I'll be there too.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ihahandle yung stress the moment bumuo na tayo ng pamilya?
question_english: How will you handle stress the moment we build a family?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang masaya pa sa pamilyang buo.
quote_english: Nothing's happier than a complete family.

question_tagalog: Anong trait natin yung gusto mong mamana ng anak natin?
question_english: What trait of ours do you want our child to inherit?
quote_tagalog: Mabait silang bata gaya natin.
quote_english: They will be kind kids just like us.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang tumira tayo malapit sa parents natin or gusto mo independent?
question_english: Do you want us to live near our parents or be independent?
quote_tagalog: Tayo lang bubuo ng sarili nating mundo.
quote_english: Just us building our own world.

question_tagalog: Anong pangarap mo ang ipinagpaliban mo muna para sakin?
question_english: What dream did you postpone for me temporarily?
quote_tagalog: Worth it ka sa lahat ng sakripisyo.
quote_english: You are worth all the sacrifices.

question_tagalog: Para sayo, ano yung edad na ready na tayo magkaanak?
question_english: For you, at what age will we be ready to have kids?
quote_tagalog: Handa na tayong maging best parents.
quote_english: We are ready to be the best parents.

question_tagalog: Ano ang nakikita mong role mo as a spouse and parent?
question_english: What do you see as your role as a spouse and parent?
quote_tagalog: Ggagawin ko ang best ko maging provider.
quote_english: I'll do my best to be a provider.

question_tagalog: Kung mawala man ang lahat ng naipon natin, kaya ba natin bumangon uli?
question_english: If we lose all our savings, can we rise again?
quote_tagalog: Basta magkasama, makakabangon tayo uli.
quote_english: As long as we're together, we will rise again.

question_tagalog: Anong klase ng lolo/lola tayo sa future?
question_english: What kind of grandma/grandpa will we be in the future?
quote_tagalog: Cool na grandparents pa rin tayo.
quote_english: We will still be cool grandparents.

question_tagalog: Ilang percent ng sahod natin ilalaan natin for savings?
question_english: What percentage of our salary will we set aside for savings?
quote_tagalog: Secure na ang future pag tayo magkasama.
quote_english: The future is secure when we are together.

question_tagalog: Paano tayo magde-decide in terms of unexpected massive expenses?
question_english: How will we decide in terms of unexpected massive expenses?
quote_tagalog: Dalawang ulo laging mas magaling.
quote_english: Two heads are always better.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo balak na pakasalan ako and settle down completely?
question_english: When do you plan to marry me and settle down completely?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang pakakasalan ko for sure.
quote_english: I will only marry you for sure.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba church wedding, beach, or huwes?
question_english: Do you want a church wedding, beach, or civil?
quote_tagalog: Basta matali ako sayo habambuhay, masaya nako.
quote_english: As long as I'm tied to you forever, I'm happy.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bucket list natin na gusto mong gawin next year?
question_english: What's on our bucket list that you want to do next year?
quote_tagalog: Gagawa tayo ng bagong memories bawat taon.
quote_english: We will make new memories every year.

question_tagalog: Ipapasok ba natin kids natin sa private or public school?
question_english: Will we send our kids to private or public school?
quote_tagalog: Ibibigay ko ang the best for them.
quote_english: I will give the best for them.

question_tagalog: Pwede bang wag pa rin nating kalimutan yung date nights pag naging parents tayo?
question_english: Can we not forget our date nights when we become parents?
quote_tagalog: Tayong dalawa parin ang priority kahit magka-anak.
quote_english: We're still the priority even with kids.

question_tagalog: Kung sakaling mag-retire tayo early, anong gagawin natin buong araw?
question_english: If we retire early, what will we do all day?
quote_tagalog: Kakasama ko buong araw walang sawa.
quote_english: Being with you all day without getting tired.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas practical pag nagde-decide ng family future?
question_english: Who between us is more practical when deciding on the family's future?
quote_tagalog: Balansehin natin palagi ang isa't isa.
quote_english: We will always balance each other out.

question_tagalog: Nakakapag-visualize ka ba pag umiiyak yung baby natin sa gabi?
question_english: Can you visualize when our baby cries at night?
quote_tagalog: Ako gigising at maghehele muna.
quote_english: I'll be the one to wake up and lull first.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang kumuha ng car for our family tours?
question_english: Do you want to get a car for our family tours?
quote_tagalog: Roadtrip tayo kasama mga bubwit.
quote_english: Let's roadtrip together with our little ones.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tuturuan ng values ang mga anak natin na parehong galing sa atin?
question_english: How will you teach values to our kids that come from both of us?
quote_tagalog: Lalaki silang mababait kagaya mo.
quote_english: They will grow up kind just like you.

question_tagalog: Kung babalikan natin ito pag tanda natin, tatawanan ba natin tong mga plano natin ngayon?
question_english: If we look back at this when we're old, will we laugh at all our plans now?
quote_tagalog: Tatawa tayong proud na nagawa natin lahat.
quote_english: We will laugh proudly that we accomplished it all.
